016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.server.config.repository;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.logging.*;
022import org.eclipse.jgit.api.*;
023import org.eclipse.jgit.api.errors.*;
024import org.eclipse.jgit.internal.storage.file.*;
025import org.eclipse.jgit.lib.*;
026import org.eclipse.jgit.transport.*;
027
028
029/**
030 * Git repository control operations for cloning, pulling, pushing, and committing.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * Provides a simplified wrapper around JGit for server configuration repository management.
034 * Used to fetch configuration files from a remote Git repository.
035 */
036@SuppressWarnings(
037   "resource" // localRepo and git are JGit resources opened in the constructor; lifecycle managed by this class's operations
038)
039public class GitControl {
040
041   private String localPath;
042   private String remotePath;
043   private Repository localRepo;
044   private Git git;
045   private CredentialsProvider cp;
046   private String name = "username";
047   private String password = "password";
048
049   /**
050    * Constructor.
051    *
052    * @param localPath Local directory path for the repository.
053    * @param remotePath Remote Git repository URI.
054    * @throws IOException If the repository cannot be opened.
055    */
056   public GitControl(String localPath, String remotePath) throws IOException {
057      this.localPath = localPath;
058      this.remotePath = remotePath;
059      this.localRepo = new FileRepository(localPath + "/.git");
060      cp = new UsernamePasswordCredentialsProvider(this.name, this.password);
061      git = new Git(localRepo);
062   }
063
064   /**
065    * Stages all files for commit.
066    *
067    * @throws GitAPIException If staging fails.
068    */
069   public void addToRepo() throws GitAPIException {
070      var add = git.add();
071      add.addFilepattern(".").call();
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Checks out the specified branch from origin.
076    *
077    * @param name Branch name.
078    * @throws GitAPIException If checkout fails.
079    */
080   public void branch(String name) throws GitAPIException {
081      git.checkout().setName(name).setStartPoint("origin/".concat(name)).call();
082   }
083
084   /**
085    * Clones the remote repository to the local path.
086    *
087    * @throws GitAPIException If clone fails.
088    */
089   public void cloneRepo() throws GitAPIException {
090      Git.cloneRepository().setURI(remotePath).setDirectory(new File(localPath)).call();
091   }
092
093   /**
094    * Commits staged changes with the specified message.
095    *
096    * @param message Commit message.
097    * @throws JGitInternalException If an internal JGit error occurs.
098    * @throws GitAPIException If commit fails.
099    */
100   public void commitToRepo(String message)
101      throws JGitInternalException, GitAPIException {
102      git.commit().setMessage(message).call();
103   }
104
105   /**
106    * Pulls the latest changes from the remote repository.
107    *
108    * @throws GitAPIException If pull fails.
109    */
110   public void pullFromRepo() throws GitAPIException {
111      git.pull().call();
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Pushes all committed changes to the remote repository.
116    *
117    * @throws JGitInternalException If an internal JGit error occurs.
118    * @throws GitAPIException If push fails.
119    */
120   public void pushToRepo() throws JGitInternalException, GitAPIException {
121      var pc = git.push();
122      pc.setCredentialsProvider(cp).setForce(true).setPushAll();
123      try {
124         var it = pc.call().iterator();
125         if (it.hasNext()) {
126            Logger.getLogger(GitControl.class).info("{}", it.next().toString());
127         }
128      } catch (InvalidRemoteException e) {
129         Logger.getLogger(GitControl.class).warning(e, "Error pushing to remote repository.");
130      }
131   }
132}
